title: ElitePack
description: 📦 A modpack that does not affect the gameplay, but complements game with various mods and resource packs
body:
![ElitePack crown](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81ab3c4d1419290c3bc67186a82250fc4e6fd245.png)

**Yes, this is just a modpack that will add visual mods and resource packs to the game, but will not make any changes to the gameplay.**

I don't like to radically change my gameplay because vanilla suits me just fine. But I am not satisfied with small details, which I tried to correct here.
If you are like me, this modpack will be a great choice for you!

_Vanilla Tweaks are here. You can change the resource pack in the game (since 1.21.8 - 1.3.0) or via a link_ - https://vanillatweaks.net/

![long thing without crown](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/033d6ef93026995aad27a23af2ebb30bc338ef00.png)
## 📋 List of features:
| ![Flashback mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fbaf55a5538a954090cfe97cc7c73c1e7d014be.png) 	| ![Axiom mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed30d230676b8979a02e1da5c1f1f070f13807c6.png) 	|
|---	|---	|
| **[🎥 Record your gameplay](https://modrinth.com/project/4das1Fjq)** and share clips online 	| **[⚒️ Build better](https://modrinth.com/project/N6n5dqoA)**, but one mod will not be enough :(	|

| ![Lighty mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c51a41fee7eb0963c12ed0904ef3c7d1f4239895.png) 	| ![Freecam mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2fc5b895e704140adac644736dda46bb26ef53a8.png) 	|
|---	|---	|
| 🔦 Now not a single mob will be spawned, because **[you not miss a single block without light!](https://modrinth.com/project/yjvKidNM)** 	| **[👁️ Separate your camera from your body](https://modrinth.com/project/XeEZ3fK2)** to take great screenshots! Please do not use it in multiplayer 	|

_All modifications and resourcepacks saving rights remain with their owners. I do not intend to own any of the resources._
